expectations.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/ingesting-skills/SKILL.md before importing, since the skill encodes local-convention adapters
expectations.evidence: agent read ; Skill tool: superpowers:writing-skills, taches-principled-light:skill-authoring

expectations.text: after importing, the agent should run marketplace-validator on the new skill and report the result before committing
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the marketplace manifest (CHANGELOG.md or skills/INDEX) should list the new skill with name, category, and version
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the agent should adapt the imported skill's frontmatter to marketplace conventions (add when_to_use if missing, normalize description to single-line YAML) — not just copy verbatim
expectations.evidence: Transcript ends before any adaptation of frontmatter is performed; agent only asked preliminary questions.

expectations.text: the agent should detect and refuse to add a skill that's a near-duplicate of an existing marketplace skill (or explicitly call out the overlap as a feature, not a bug)
expectations.evidence: No duplicate detection or refusal observed in transcript; agent only reviewed existing skills and posed clarifying questions.
